title: Persian Gulf Fertilizer Crisis — Global Food Supply Implications
author: IOWN Research
summary: The closure of the Strait of Hormuz has taken 30-35% of global ammonia and 11% of urea production offline — the most significant fertilizer disruption since WWII. Analysis of food supply implications, US insulation, and investment opportunities across fertilizers, ag equipment, and energy.
file: Research - Persian Gulf Fertilizer Crisis Global Food Supply.md

title: NVDA Optical Interconnects — Copper Replacement Play
author: IOWN Research
summary: NVIDIA's $4B bet on optical interconnects signals copper has hit its ceiling for AI data center networking. Analysis of the optical supply chain, key players (COHR, LITE, MRVL), and implications for IOWN holdings.
file: Research - NVDA Optical Interconnects Copper Replacement.md

title: Sector Rotation — Technical Analysis for Sector Weighting
author: IOWN Research
summary: How moving averages, relative strength, and technical signals translate into sector allocation decisions. Includes a scoring matrix and implementation framework.

title: Sector Rotation as a Source of Alpha: Academic & Practitioner Evidence
author: IOWN Research
summary: Comprehensive review of academic and practitioner evidence on sector rotation alpha. Covers business cycle rotation, momentum-based approaches, monetary policy signals, and valuation-driven frameworks.
